problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression may resolve Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
